name: Soft Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter, sugars, eggs, and vanilla in a large mixing bowl.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, wheat germ, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture alternately with milk, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in raisins.
5. Drop dough by teaspoonfuls, about 2 inches apart, onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Remove from the oven and transfer to wire racks to cool.
Makes about 7 dozen cookies.
